name: the SARIF bus merges multiple tools into one 2.1.0 log and reports red on an error-level result
command:
printf 'id: g-test-axis
name: axis-rule
description: a rule for testing the 4-axis schema
detector: rubric/detectors/cloud-guidance-rule.sh
type: problem
fixable:
has_suggestions: false
deprecated: false
replaced_by: []
docs_url: https://e.com
requires_type_checking: false
recommended: true
severity: P0
version: 1.0.0
semver: 1.0.0
rule_state: warn-only
provenance:
- source: x
  url: https://e.com
  fetched_at: "2026-06-20T00:00:00Z"
' >/dev/null; printf '# 0001

## Decision

Leave ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0).
' > a.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --root . --paths a.md --json > pj.sarif 2>/dev/null; printf '# T

```
x
```
' > b.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/md-structure.sh" --rule g-md-fenced-code-language-declared --root . --paths b.md --json > md.sarif 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/sarif-aggregate.sh" --in pj.sarif --in md.sarif --json > merged.sarif 2>sum.txt; rc=$?; node -e 'const d=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("merged.sarif"));if(d.version!=="2.1.0"||d.runs.length<2)process.exit(1)' && [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' sum.txt && echo bus-merged-red 1>&2
